ORDER GRANTING MARIA C. CORONADO'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; FOR ORDER COMPELLING RELEASE OF TAX RETURNS; FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS -- PHILLIP MORGAN APPEARING FOR CUSTODIAL PARENT MARIA DEL CARMEN CORONADO. AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS BY JANUARY 3, 2005. PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING RESPONDENT TO EXECUTE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE AUTHORIZATIONS IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS THE AUTHORITY TO ORDER THE RESPONDENT TO SIGN THE REQUESTED WAIVER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 3, 2005. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
